narrative:
Dávinson Sánchez is a formidable Centre-Back for Colombia. His overall rating of 7.46/10 places him in the top 1% of centre-backs at this tournament, highlighting his elite status. This rating is based on a range of 7.07–7.84, reflecting the match sample size.

Sánchez demonstrates strong defensive capabilities, evidenced by his 5.5 clearances per 90 minutes at this World Cup. He also contributes with 1.25 interceptions per 90 minutes. While his attacking output is minimal with 0.095 expected goals per 90 minutes, his primary role is clearly defensive.

Sánchez is a pivotal defensive anchor for Colombia, having played 360 World Cup minutes. Scouts should continue to observe his consistent defensive actions, particularly his clearances and interceptions. His overall rating, 73% derived from club form and 27% from this World Cup, suggests sustained high performance.
